title: Just Enough Fishing (JEF)
description: Adds fishing loot tables to Just Enough Items (JEI),  allowing you to see what you can fish up in the world.
body:
This mod adds fishing information to [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei). To see all fishing information, press the JEI Uses Key (by default 'U') on a fishing rod. To see a specific fishable, press the JEI Recipe Key (by default 'R') on any item that can be fished up.

If you have [Aquaculture](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture) installed, then pressing the JEI Uses Key on an Iron, Gold, Diamond, or Neptunium fishing rod will also work. Vanilla fishables are separated by type of item, while Aquaculture 2 fishables are separated by their respective biome(s).

This mod also shows additional information on hovering over some fishables.

**Features:**

Showcases the various categories of fishable loot
![A photo of a JEI GUI showcasing fish that can be caught.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec10791d6b86be778511ef9d2e21d3918d155560_0.webp)

Hovering over the items in the GUI will show any additional information
![A photo showcasing that hovering over items in the GUI will note additional information such as biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b13148b93b1b66965c8856309320df80b00e7fd_0.webp)

Supports Aquaculture 2 and is categorized by biome
![A photo showcasing support for the mod Aquaculture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96584f7d77d36b521a449a295190f417a8409e88_0.webp)

You MAY use this mod in your modpacks as long as you have a link back to this page. No need to ask.

You MAY NOT redistribute or re-upload this mod without my permission.
